REMITTITUR FILED THE COURT DETERMINES THAT APPELLANT'S CONTENTIONS FAIL TO DEMONSTRATE PREJUDICAL ERROR. THEREFORE IT IS ORDERED BY THE COURT THAT THE JUDGMENT MADE AND ENTERED IN THE LIMITED JUR- ISDICTION OF THE COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, STATE OF CA, IN HEREBY AFFIRMED. PURSUSANT TO SECTION 1034 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE AND RULES 135A,135B,AND 135C OF THE CA RULE OF COURT, COST ARE HEREBY AWARDED THE PREVAILING PARTY.
